name: Media Player.Speaker → Play On Device Media File
description: This action will play a on-device media file.

config_entries.label: Media File
config_entries.description: The ID of the media file.

config_entries.label: Announcement
config_entries.description: Whether to play back the file as an announcement or media stream. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Enqueue
config_entries.description: Whether to add the media file to the end of the pipeline's internal playlist. Defaults to `false`.
